# Cross-backend Tier-1 comparison

MLX backend: `mlx` on `mps` (mlx-4bit), model `mlx-community/gemma-4-26b-a4b-it-4bit`
PyTorch backend: `pytorch` on `cuda` (bfloat16), model `google/gemma-4-26B-A4B-it`

Position-0 top-1 matches: **1/3** prompts
Average top-5 overlap: **1.03** across 30 positions

Agreement floors: first-token top-1 matches >= 1; avg top-5 overlap >= 0.5.
